atomic_facts.fact: A person wearing blue gloves is using a hex key tool to adjust a bicycle brake caliper.
The hex key is inserted into the mounting bolt of the brake caliper.
The brake caliper is positioned over a silver disc brake rotor.
Wheel spokes are visible behind the brake assembly.

spatial: The hands wearing blue gloves are to the left of the brake assembly. The hex key tool is held by the hands and inserted into the center of the brake caliper. The silver disc brake rotor is behind the brake caliper and to the right of the tool.
